title: Evolve Community Create
description: A utility mod for the (german) community project.
body: This mod displays a custom main menu. It allows users to directly join the community server for the project [Community Create VII](https://modrinth.com/project/community-create-vii). You can join the [discord](https://evolvemc.de/discord) if you'd like to join. **Please note that this project is german only.**
